title: Haxnicks Indoor & Outdoor Sustainable Bamboo Fibre Plant Saucer | 8 Inch Diameter | Terracotta | Pot200201
features: SUSTAINABLE AND COMPOSTABLE Made from sustainable bamboo fibre, rice starch and resin made from naturally occurring organic compounds. Free from petroleum-based plastics and BPA.

DURABLE Durable and should last for 5 years or more after which they are biodegradable and home compostable. Composting the products may take 6-12 months. Breaking the products into small pieces before adding them to your compost heap will help speed up this process.
SUITABLE FOR INDOOR OR OUTDOOR USE Haxnicks Bamboo Range can be used in any location from homes and offices to gardens.
RANGE OF SIZES Available in a range of sizes (from 3 to 8 inches) meaning they are suitable for most plant pots.
MATCHING PLANT POTS AVAILABLE Matching plant pots are available for all Haxnicks Bamboo saucers. The perfect partner for this saucer is Haxnicks POT190201, search B09SJ32NB3 on Amazon.
description: From the manufacturer Hello From Haxnicks Garden Products and Pest Control Haxnicks are pasisonate about gardening and have been designing and manufacturing inspirational grow-your-own products for many years. Professional, experienced and amateur gardeners all love to grow using our innovative, easy to use products. This bamboo range is a step on the road to turning the tide on plastics in the garden and a great choice for the gardener who wants to make a difference and be kinder to the environment. Made from Sustainable Bamboo Haxnicks award winning range of pots, saucers and seed trays are made from sustainable bamboo fibre, rice starch and natural resin. Can be added to your home compost heap To dispose of the Haxnicks Bamboo Range, add them to your compost heap. Break them into pieces and soak in water to speed up the process. Composting may take 6 to 12 months. Remove the need for plastic in the garden Plastics are becoming an increasing problem for wildlife and the environment. Its estimated that 500 million plastic pots are sold in the UK every year, many are single use and the majority are sent to landfill and can take around 500 years to decompose. Available in 2 colours and a range of sizes Haxnicks Bamboo Pots & Saucers are available in Traditional Terracotta or Sage Green. From 3 to 8 Inches in diameter (7.5 to 20cm)
